resources.string: Open system text-to-speech settings to choose engine, voice, speed and pitch.
"Allow the app to access the camera through the phone settings in the Privacy section. Without this access, the app cannot work."
Camera access is not yet permitted.
Please check your internet connection and try again, or contact us.
This application is not licensed nor valid. Please download the app from a trusted source.
This banknote is only available in the Full version.
Try the Full Version for Free
"Identification of banknotes is done using your phone's camera. Please confirm access to the camera."

"In this mode, Đọc Tiền compares your banknote with %s banknotes of all currencies it can identify. Therefore, it is necessary to show as much of the banknote as possible to achieve the correct identification.
Hold your phone in one hand and a banknote in the other hand. To be sure that your back camera is pointed at the banknote, place the hand in which you hold your phone on the wrist of the hand in which you hold the banknote. This approach is easy and creates an ideal distance for reliable identification."

"Choose which currency will be identified from the list below. Let us know if your currency is not on the list. Do you need to sort banknotes with different currencies? Use the button at the bottom of the screen to identify all available currencies at the same time."
If you have already redeemed your code and paired it with you Google account, just login the Google account again to restore it.
Have you already redeemed your code?

Đọc Tiền will pair your license with your Google account to ensure that you have your lifetime license connected with your Google independently on device. Please sign in your Google account using the button below.
You can now identify all banknote denominations, including high-value notes, and recognize banknotes from any country in the world.
"%1$s won't work unless you enable Google Play services."
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are missing from your device."
%1$s is having trouble with Google Play services. Please try again.
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are not supported by your device."
"%1$s won't run unless you update Google Play services."
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are currently updating."
New version of Google Play services needed. It will update itself shortly.
The value of the banknote after currency conversion is only informative.
"Loading rates for currency conversion. Please try this feature later."
"Đọc Tiền will convert the identified banknote denomination into your home currency. Banknote denomination and value in the home currency are announced together."
Czech Crown identification free of charge thanks to Đọc Tiền team!
"Đọc Tiền identifies all Czech Crown banknotes free of charge! Thanks to the sponsorship from Đọc Tiền team!"
Czech Crown identification is free of charge!

"Currencies below are downloaded to your phone, and their identification will work even without an Internet connection. Select currencies you no longer need and press the delete button to free up some space."
Your Google account has already valid and paired license. No need to activate new one. Login in app settings to restore the previous one.
"Your application is already in full mode without any limitation. The redeem code hasn't been aplied. It would have no effect."
"A network error occurred while attempting to redeem the code. Please check your internet connection and try again."
Please try again later or contact us.
"An unexpected error occurred while redeeming the code. Please try again later, or contact support."
Unfortunately sign-in failed. Try again later.
"The code '%s' you entered is invalid. Please check the code and try again."
"The code '%s' has already been used to unlock the lifetime version of Đọc Tiền. If you believe this is an error, please contact support."
Do not show future release notes
All at once identification is less reliable. Select currency whenever possible.
Tap to switch to selecting a day
Tap to switch to selecting a year

"Banknotes update is available: U.S. dollar (1, 2, 5, 10, 20), Uruguayan peso (20, 50), Ukrainian hryvnia (100), Saudi riyal (5), Philippine peso (1000), Peruvian Sol (200), Nicaraguan cordoba (10, 1000), Moroccan dirham (50), Libyan Dinar (20), Laotian Kip (100000), Honduran lempira (100), Algerian Dinar (100), Chinese yuan (1, 5, 10), Belarussian Ruble (100, 200), Albanian Lek (500, 2000), Russian ruble (100, 5000)"
Let me select from the list
I agree and I would like to start using the application.

"Now please choose what currency will be identified by Đọc Tiền. If you need to sort between different currencies, you can always switch to a mode where multiple currencies are identified at the same time."

"The money reading mobile app for the blind and visually impaired.
Đọc Tiền identifies banknote denominations for the largest number of currencies. Point your camera at the bill and hear, see or feel its value.
To get started, please grant us access to your camera."

"We do our best to correctly identify all banknotes. Under specific circumstances, however, there may be some mistakes. By using this application, you acknowledge and agree that for any damage caused to you or third parties by misrepresentation of any banknote, we relinquish all responsibility. Please also note that the application is unable to detect counterfeit banknotes."
"Unable to retrieve purchase information. Please check your Internet connection and try again."
"You have successfully purchased a lifetime license for the Full version of the app. You will get access to all future features, with free updates."
"You are using the Full version with a monthly plan. "
You are using the Full version with a yearly plan.
"Pay just once, and never again. Get new features and banknote updates for as long as money is being printed!"
Please see privacy policy and terms and conditions via buttons below.
If you want to purchase a lifetime license, you must cancel current subscription and wait until the paid period is over.
"Get unlimited identification for almost every banknote around the world. Notes are changing, but we keep an eye on more than a hundred currencies for always accurate identification!"

"Become our subscriber and receive updates as new banknotes are issued or being taken out of circulation. We have you covered with reliable banknotes identification and a continuous stream of new features!"
Currently set up to vibrate in Silent mode only.
Currently set up to always vibrate.

"The app can transform the identified value of a banknote into vibrations. The vibrations are always used when your phone is in silent mode, because in silent mode the app cannot speak the value aloud. Here, you can set it up so that the vibrations are also allowed in Ring mode."
"Use this button to open Đọc Tiền's system settings. Select your preferred app language."
Select currency the app should identify.
"For the selected currency, the app can quickly announce just the identified denomination or banknote's full name, including currency."
"You are using the Full version with a lifetime license. Thank you for your support!"
"You are using the Full version with a monthly plan. Your subscription will be automatically renewed on %s."

"You are using Free version, and the identification is limited to only low denomination banknotes. The Full version will help you to identify almost every banknote in the world! Please choose the Full version plan, which best suits your needs."
"You are using the Full version with a yearly plan. Your subscription will be automatically renewed on %s."
If you are unaware of whether the app is active and currently identifying banknotes, enable the periodic beeping sound.

"You can enable a button to appear on the main screen to send us photo for inspection. Tap the button whenever you think the app is giving you incorrect results and we will check it. This will allow us to improve identification over time, thank you! We will never share your photo with anyone and it will be deleted after inspection."

"Do you know somebody who could use Đọc Tiền? Send them a link for easy download through your favorite communication app. The list of available apps for sending the link is displayed at the bottom of the screen. Thank you for sharing!"
Send a download link to your friends
If you missed anything from the tutorial, rewind it here.
Follow us for latest news, insights, and updates from Đọc Tiền.
Currently set to use back camera.
Currently set to use front camera.

"Choose which camera to use for banknote identification. We recommend to use the back camera as it can turn on the flashlight in the dark. Avoid using the front camera at night when the screen is off."
"Light from your device's flashlight improves the identification rate in the dark. It will switch off automatically when you leave the app."
"The series of vibrations represent the value of identified banknotes. Go to vibrations settings to learn how to use them and to set up their behavior."
"Your device does not support vibrations. The app will speak the denomination of identified banknote aloud."
Vibrations are not available when Đọc Tiền identifies all currencies at once. Vibrations settings will be available when you select a currency.
"If you're happy with the app, please rate us and write a review. For any issues, please write us an email and we will fix it for you!"
If you have trouble using our app or if you have any ideas for improvements, just write us an email.
Your phone is not configured to send emails. Contact us from a different device on %s.

"Auto-renewable subscription with %s days free trial period. Your card won't be charged if you cancel subscription before the trial period ends. It unlocks the Full version for the billed period, and you will be charged automatically at the start of every subscription period. You can cancel subscription at any time from this Purchase screen."

"It looks like this app is not installed from Google Play, it is illegally modified or hacking apps are installed on this device. Do not worry, you can always download the original Đọc Tiền from Google Play. Please, make sure that all hacking apps are uninstalled before! However, if you have tried fresh installation from Google Play app and this alert still appears, please contact us via the email button below. Đọc Tiền is made possible only by the constant support coming from users subscriptions. Thank you for understanding!"
One hundred Trinidad and Tobago Dollars

"We want to help you during this difficult time. You can identify your banknotes without limit and use all app features, even in the free version.
Our thoughts are with you. Đọc Tiền team"
Ukrainian hryvnia identification is free of charge!
License is invalid because you have been using an unauthorized app such as Lucky Patcher. Please reinstall the app when the unauthorized app is completely uninstalled.
License is invalid because we have found you have %1$s app installed on your device.

"Learn vibration patterns for each banknote of %s by playing them in this settings environment. Vibration pattern follows this general rule: One vibration for the lowest denomination, two vibrations for the second lowest denomination and so on."
